overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a futuristic downtown district. The clip begins with a third-person follow camera tracking a black aerial vehicle navigating neon-lit streets, then transitions to first-person perspective at 17s, continuing on foot through intersections and along sidewalks beneath elevated highways. The environment features dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic billboards, palm trees, scattered pedestrians, and vibrant neon signage contrasting with bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with flying vehicle traffic

events.description: flying vehicle banks left and accelerates through the intersection

agents.ego_description: camera tracks the aerial vehicle smoothly from behind and slightly above, maintaining consistent distance

notable_agents.action: black spherical aerial vehicle hovering and navigating through city streets at moderate speed

entered.detail: black spherical aerial vehicle with yellow accent lights and transparent canopy
prominent building with large illuminated 'CANT BREATHE' signage in white letters
green metal elevated highway structure spanning across the street
large digital advertisement screen with cyan and pink neon graphics
tall palm tree with green fronds against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cinematic follow shot of a black aerial vehicle navigating a futuristic cyberpunk plaza. The vehicle moves smoothly past the iconic 'CANT BREATHE' building and various neon-lit structures, with palm trees and glass towers visible in the background. Sparse pedestrians walk along the wide concrete sidewalks as the vehicle approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and elevated highway

events.description: perspective shifts from following aerial vehicle to first-person ground level, beginning street crossing
crossing the wide intersection with yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles wait at the traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk, then turning right onto the sidewalk, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead across the crosswalk
futuristic sedan stopped at the red traffic light, waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: zebra crossing with white stripes and yellow tactile paving at the intersection
futuristic traffic signal pole with green walk indicator illuminated
row of colorful futuristic vehicles parked along the street curb
line of deciduous trees providing shade along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The perspective drops to street level as the aerial vehicle flies away, transitioning to a first-person view crossing a busy intersection. The camera moves across the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing waiting vehicles and other pedestrians, then turns right onto a sidewalk beneath the elevated highway. The 'CANT BREATHE' building remains visible on the left while the environment becomes more enclosed by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk corridor beneath elevated highway with neon signage

events.description: sidewalk becomes littered with trash and debris, indicating a more neglected urban area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and observing the street environment

notable_agents.action: person in bright yellow jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: floating green holographic display showing product advertisements
scattered trash, bags, and debris covering the sidewalk surface
large digital screen displaying animated neon advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along a narrow sidewalk corridor beneath the elevated highway, with the concrete structure casting shadows overhead. The path is lined with palm trees and various pedestrians walking in opposing directions. Holographic advertisements and bright neon signs illuminate the left side of the street, while the sidewalk shows increasing amounts of litter and urban decay. The camera maintains a steady walking pace through this dense cyberpunk streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cinematic aerial perspective of a futuristic plaza to a grounded, first-person walk through a dense urban corridor. It begins by tracking a black aerial vehicle as it glides past the iconic CANT BREATHE building and glass towers amidst a landscape of neon structures and palm trees. As the vehicle flies away, the perspective drops to street level, moving across a yellow-striped crosswalk and passing waiting traffic before turning right onto a sidewalk. The scene then shifts from the open plaza to a more enclosed environment beneath an elevated highway, where the overhead concrete structure casts deep shadows over the path. Finally, the camera maintains a steady walking pace through this narrow corridor, passing holographic advertisements and neon signs that contrast with the increasing litter and urban decay of the streetscape.
